task_description: Build a comprehensive, fully-featured personal financial budgeting app with expense management, budget tracking, income tracking, savings goals, bill reminders, debt management, net worth tracking, financial reports, calendar, personalized insights, and settings. All data persists in localStorage with personalization based on onboarding answers.

verification.summary: bun run build passes - all 18 routes generated successfully (/, /_not-found, /dashboard, /dashboard/bills, /dashboard/budgets, /dashboard/calendar, /dashboard/debts, /dashboard/income, /dashboard/insights, /dashboard/net-worth, /dashboard/reports, /dashboard/savings, /dashboard/settings, /dashboard/transactions, /login, /onboarding). bun run lint passes with 0 errors (1 pre-existing warning for unused _password in AuthContext).
